creator: joseph@josephholsten.com
text:
Both Samba 4.13 & 4.16 are EOL per https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_Release_Planning#General_information

Potential impact:

4.14 had no removed features: https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_4.14_Features_added/changed#NEW_FEATURES/CHANGES
4.15 Removed features: https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_4.15_Features_added/changed#REMOVED_FEATURES
4.16 Removed features: https://wiki.samba.org/index.php/Samba_4.16_Features_added/changed#REMOVED_FEATURES


Prior bump ticket: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=248432

I've never contributed a patch, but I'm happy to submit if all we're just going with 4.16.

We probably need to discuss getting a version that still receives security maintenance, but that's definitely a bigger effort.
